SELECTED
WORK

04 Projects
01 · Featured · NASSCOM + Cisco

SEMI-AUTONOMOUS UNDERWATER ROVER

Designed and deployed an underwater inspection rover for remote human monitoring. Integrated real-time control systems with ML-based human detection in low-visibility underwater environments. Competed against 1,440+ teams across India. Felicitated in New Delhi on 17.03.2026.

Python Computer Vision Deep Learning ₹5,00,000 Funded

NASSCOM Foundation + Cisco
Detection Accuracy
~94%
02 · YOLOv8 · National Winner
MICROPLASTIC DETECTION

Real-time contamination detection achieving 93–96% accuracy. YOLOv8-powered prototype. Won ₹25,000 at SCIMIT 26. Finalist at India Innovates 2026, presented to central government officials.

₹25K Prize YOLOv8 OpenCV
03 · IIT Bombay
AUTONOMOUS MAPPING

ROS 2 + SLAM navigation on TurtleBot Burger. Mapping accuracy improved ~25%, navigation errors reduced ~30% via multi-sensor fusion and advanced path planning algorithms.

ROS 2 SLAM Gazebo IIT Bombay
04 · IIT Madras · 1st Prize
RICE CLASSIFICATION

CNN-based rice grain classification model achieving 94% accuracy. Identified grain variety from image data using deep convolutional networks. Secured 1st prize & ₹2,000 cash award at IIT Madras.

₹2K Prize CNN IIT Madras
